name: Virtual Workspace + 512GB Secondary Storage
postStartCommand:
bash -c '
    echo "=== 512GB Secondary Big Storage Check (postStartCommand) ==="
    if ! mountpoint -q /workspaces/bigdata; then
      echo "Bigdata not mounted. Attempting mount by LABEL=BIGDATA..."
      sudo mount LABEL=BIGDATA /workspaces/bigdata 2>/dev/null && echo "SUCCESS: BIGDATA mounted" || {
        echo "WARNING: Could not auto-mount BIGDATA."
        echo "The 512GB disk may have been reset by GitHub (common after stop/start or rebuild)."

        echo "Manual recovery options:"
        echo "  1. sudo mount /dev/sdc1 /workspaces/bigdata   (if device exists)"
        echo "  2. Check with: sudo lsblk -f /dev/sdc"
      }
    else
      echo "SUCCESS: BIGDATA already mounted at /workspaces/bigdata"
    fi

    # Always ensure correct ownership
    sudo chown -R codespace:codespace /workspaces/bigdata 2>/dev/null || true

    # Show clear status
    echo "Main 32GB workspace: $(df -h /workspaces | tail -1)"
    df -h /workspaces/bigdata 2>/dev/null | tail -1 || echo "Bigdata: Not mounted"
    echo "=== End of Big Storage Check ==="
  '
